commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Man. Hebrew, "eat not bread of an evil eye "the envious, or rather the sordid miser.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: [Solomon] calls war a matter full of disorder, a matter in need of many hands. Or, he may be warning us not to rush to war inconsiderately. Behold, he says, When a decision must be taken, is it not always beneficial to have wisdom in the middle of things? Commentary on the Proverbs of Solomon, Fragment

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
